overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing movement through a narrow canyon between large concrete breakwater blocks, emerging into an open coastal harbor area with calm water and geometric concrete structures. The environment features a low-poly, stylized aesthetic typical of modern game engines with bright sunlight and clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon between tall concrete breakwater blocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage between large concrete structures

entered.detail: tall geometric concrete wall with layered block structure
dark jagged rock wall with rough texture
reddish-orange sand covering the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow canyon passage flanked by tall concrete breakwater blocks on the left and dark rock formations on the right. The sandy floor stretches ahead under bright sunlight filtering from above, creating a confined yet open-air environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from canyon to open harbor

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into the open waterfront area revealing the harbor and ocean

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon onto the open coastal area with the harbor coming into view

entered.detail: large standalone rock formation at the canyon exit
calm blue water of the harbor basin
concrete tetrapod structures in the water

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal a stunning waterfront view with a large monolith rock marking the transition. The harbor water becomes visible ahead, dotted with concrete breakwater structures, while the enclosing canyon walls fall away to the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal harbor with concrete infrastructure

events.description: camera turns right to face the harbor water and examine the breakwater structures

agents.ego_description: exploring the waterfront path and observing the harbor structures and distant coastline

entered.detail: low concrete platforms and walkways extending into the water
mountainous landmass visible across the water
small green bush on the sandy shore

segments.scene_description: Moving freely along the open waterfront, the camera reveals the full extent of the harbor with its concrete dock structures and breakwaters. The view expands to show distant mountains across the water and sparse coastal vegetation, with the camera turning to survey the serene harbor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow concrete canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit coastal harbor. It begins by moving forward through a confined passage flanked by tall concrete breakwater blocks and dark rock formations over a sandy floor. As the camera advances, the enclosing walls fall away and the view expands past a large monolith rock to reveal the shimmering waterfront. The scene then shifts into an open expanse, gliding along the harbor where geometric concrete docks and breakwaters dot the calm water. Finally, the camera turns to survey the serene environment, revealing sparse coastal vegetation and distant mountains across the horizon under a clear sky.
